about.label: About us
about.title: Production based on experience and quality
about.description: Our company specializes in producing corporate work uniforms, special clothing and custom orders.

form.name: Your name *

aboutDetailsHero.description: Behind every order lies great responsibility. For us, quality is not just about sewing — it is our customers' trust in us.

responsibility.title: Responsible approach
responsibility.description: We treat your order as our own business

partnership.title: Reliable partner
partnership.description: We keep our word on deadlines and quality

title.line1: We deliver not only quality products,
title.line2: but also trust and peace of mind.

promise.description: When our customers trust us, we work even better. Your success is our greatest goal.

values.title: What sets us apart from others.

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: High-quality materials and flawless stitching are our standard.

trust.title: Trust
trust.description: Every order is trust placed in us. We value it.

time.title: Timeliness
time.description: Time is money. That's why we always deliver on time.

precision.title: Precision
precision.description: Precision and thoroughness in every detail — the guarantee of a perfect result.

whyUs.title: We choose only the best for you.

materials.title: Premium materials
materials.description: We use only tested and certified materials.

equipment.title: Modern equipment
equipment.description: Precise, quality production using the latest technology equipment.

team.title: Experienced team
team.description: We work with a team of specialists with over 10 years of experience.

quality.title: Quality control
quality.description: Every product goes through multi-stage quality control.

delivery.title: On-time delivery
delivery.description: Reliable and safe delivery within the agreed deadline.

approach.title: Individual approach
approach.description: We offer a unique solution based on each customer's needs.

1.name: Asil Textile
1.text: Our order was completed on time and with great quality. Working with the team was very pleasant and efficient.

2.name: Modern Wear
2.text: Quality, precision and responsibility — we found all of this with the Details team. Always better than we expected.

3.name: Elegant Boutique
3.text: The quality of the clothing is excellent. Their attention to every detail impressed us.

4.name: Urban Style
4.text: A reliable and responsible manufacturer for long-term partnership. We recommend them!

1.question: What is the minimum order quantity?
1.answer: The order quantity depends on the product type. Contact us for more details.

2.question: How long does it take for an order to be ready?
2.answer: This depends on the product type and quantity. The production timeline is usually agreed upon in advance.

3.question: Can you sew according to my own design?
3.answer: Yes. We produce products based on your design, measurements and requirements.

4.question: Do you also offer delivery service?
4.answer: Yes. We reliably deliver orders to the agreed address.

5.question: How is quality controlled?
5.answer: Every product is checked at several stages of production and undergoes final inspection.

cta.title: Let's bring your project to life together.
cta.description: Your idea will turn into a perfect product with our experience and quality production.
